$comment: Stack-level expectations for scripts/detector-scan-test.py. Each key is a stack name from versioning_scan.json's detected_stack field. 'language' and 'app_type' may be strings or arrays; arrays mean 'any of these is acceptable'. Missing fields are not asserted. Use 'project_overrides' below for per-project adjustments that trump stack expectations.
$comment_skip: Project labels listed here are scanned but never cause the test to fail. Use for projects whose content is intentionally ambiguous or out of vocabulary.
$comment_overrides: Per-project exact overrides. Keyed by label. Same schema as stack_expectations entries.
